'''Drongar Prime''' was a [[Star/Legends|star]]<ref name="MBS" /> located in the [[Drongar system/Legends|Drongar system]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by four [[Planet/Legends|planets]]: the planet [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]; and three [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] that shielded Drongar from [[Meteorite/Legends|meteorites]] and [[Comet/Legends|comets]] in the outer reaches of the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. It was approximately the size of [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]], but burned [[Temperature/Legends|hotter]], giving Drongar a tropical climate.<ref name="MBS" />

{{Star-stub}}
